title: 1 woman killed, another injured in late-night Taunton crash
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Local News The driver, 26-year-old Selina Mendez, was rushed to a local hospital with life-threatening injuries and died soon after.
By Abby Patkin July 20, 2026 | 2:26 PM 1 minute to read One woman was killed and another injured late Friday night in a single-car crash in Taunton, authorities said.
Taunton police and emergency medics responded to a crash near 266 County St.

title: Celtics announce full 2026 preseason schedule
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Boston Celtics The Celtics will play Philadelphia twice during the four-game preseason.
Hugo Gonzalez AP Photo/Michael Dwyer The Celtics released their four-game preseason schedule on Monday, and half of the matchups involve Jaylen Brown’s new team.
Boston will have a home and home series with Philadelphia, along with a road contest in Cleveland, and a home game against Charlotte.

title: Community Healthlink more than doubles layoffs as closure nears
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Local News The Worcester-based behavioral health provider now plans to lay off 231 workers, up from 78 announced in May, as it prepares to close.
Many employees are expected to join new operators.

title: Mass. man, 91, found dead 11 days after going missing
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Local News Authorities believe believe Elliott Blackwell, who had dementia, went missing while walking in the woods behind his home July 8.
Elliott Blackwell, 91, was found dead Sunday after going missing in Warren.
Warren Police Department By Abby Patkin July 20, 2026 | 11:59 AM 1 minute to read A missing 91-year-old Massachusetts man was found dead Sunday, 11 days after he wandered away from home.

title: Robert Kraft was treated to an awkward Trump reference about the New England Revolution
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Morning Sports Update "He's OK with that actually in this country.
" New England Revolution owner Robert Kraft attends a FIFA reception at Trump Tower in New York on July 17, 2026.

Photo by Mandel NGAN / AFP via Getty Images By Hayden Bird July 20, 2026 | 11:56 AM 3 minutes to read Trump’s reference to the New England Revolution: Robert Kraft was in attendance at Trump Tower in New York City on Saturday for a FIFA reception prior to the World Cup final, sitting right in President Trump’s sightline as he delivered remarks.

title: 2 arrested following commuter rail station carjacking
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Crime A man was assaulted near the Norwood Central commuter rail station by two men before his car was stolen, police said.
Norwood police arrested two men last week who allegedly committed a carjacking near an MBTA Commuter Rail station and fled from officers, according to police officials.
The suspects were identified as 23-year-old Boston resident Johanns Miranda Pizarro and 20-year-old Norwood resident Demarcus Atkins.

title: 6 of New England’s most iconic travel experiences and the people behind them, according to Conde Nast Traveler
author: Kristi Palma
bullets: New England Travel The workers "make your favorite journeys unforgettable," according to the publication.
The Breakers mansion in Newport, framed through it's ornate wrought iron fence John Tlumacki / Boston Globe ShareSend this article to your social connections.
New England is full of iconic travel experiences and Conde Nast Traveler recently highlighted the people who bring six of them to life.
